texto: Fill your life with as many experiences as possible and do this every day. You don’t have to look for something grand
autor: learn to live in moments and look for the gift each brings.
explicacao: Orientação direta de learn to live in moments and look for the gift each brings. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Fill your life with as many experiences as possible and do this every day. You don’t have to look…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, mensah-oteh, experiences, útil em momentos de reflexao.
